_comment: Per-station sync manifest for the Mac Mini (fleet production node). Station is resolved via `scutil --get LocalHostName`; a machine with NO manifest file gets the default full sync (laptops: damilola-mba, damilola-mbp). settings 'merge' mode: repo wins ONLY on settings_owned_keys — every other live key survives untouched, so fleet-local settings can never be clobbered by a sync. To hand a drifted key to repo control, add it to settings_owned_keys deliberately (that is the ratification step).
